15.reason: [The space after %d in scanf can cause input parsing issues by consuming extra whitespace unexpectedly, potentially skipping or misreading subsequent inputs.]

21.reason: [Incrementing i beyond 100 leads to invalid stack state; once full, further pushes should not alter i. Also, error should be printed without trailing space inconsistency (though minor).]

31.reason: [This check comes too late; i was just decremented from 0, making it -1, but the condition i!=0 allowed entry when i was 0, which is incorrect. Should check i==0 before decrementing.]
